title: Plugin Missing Runtime Deps
objective: Install a plugin that imports an undeclared runtime dependency and verify OpenClaw reports the dependency failure without taking down the gateway.

phases.title: Install Missing-Dependency Plugin
phases.intent: Install a fixture whose runtime entry imports a package it does not declare.

phases.title: Restart And Capture Failure
phases.intent: Restart so OpenClaw attempts to load the plugin and emits missing dependency diagnostics.

phases.title: Gateway Survival Check
phases.intent: Confirm one bad plugin does not make the user-facing gateway unusable.
